title: Agroinformatics Lab
text:
About the Lab
Nicolas Martin improves agricultural decision-making by integrating spatial analytics with geospatial intelligence. His research develops participatory frameworks connecting farmers and agronomists as citizen scientists. He prioritizes open-source tools to democratize access to advanced algorithms and complex data.
